MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.x_api_poster
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/x_api_poster.py (1105 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: X/Twitter API v2 Poster - OAuth 2.0 with PKCE

CLASSES:
- XOAuth2Poster: Posts tweets using X API v2 with OAuth 2.0 PKCE
  Methods: def is_configured(self) -> bool
  Methods: def is_token_expired(self) -> bool
  Methods: def get_authorization_url(self) -> tuple
  Methods: async def exchange_code_for_tokens(self, code: str, code_verifier: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def refresh_access_token(self) -> bool
  Methods: def can_post(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def upload_media(self, image_bytes: bytes, media_type: str='image/png') -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def post_tweet_with_media(self, text: str, image_bytes: bytes) -> Optional[Dict]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def load_env()
- def create_oauth1_signature(method: str, url: str, params: dict, oauth1_config: dict) -> str
- def has_oauth1_credentials() -> bool
- def get_x_api_poster() -> XOAuth2Poster
- async def post_to_x_api(text: str) -> Optional[Dict]
